name: metarepo-sc-cli
description: Companion CLI for the metarepo-sc VSCode extension — multi-repo diff viewer with fzf navigation and silent VSCode bridge.
author: mattgle

scripts.lint: if command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then shellcheck bin/metarepo-sc; else echo 'shellcheck not installed — skipping (install: brew install shellcheck OR apt install shellcheck)'; fi
